steps.title: Read the control signal
steps.content: The painter repeatedly compromises his art because he is passive and finds it difficult to say no. When exhibitors, praisers, and buyers begin to determine the work, the word points to outside pressure shaping what the art becomes.

steps.title: Reject weaker meanings
steps.content: A means ending or inferring, C means judging, and D means selecting from options; none captures imposed control. The remaining meaning is to prescribe or control the direction of the work. The answer is B.
